questionText: Indicate which targets reported in 7.53.1/2 incorporate methane emissions, or if you do not have a methane-specific emissions reduction target for your fossil fuel activities, please explain why not and forecast how your methane emissions will change over the next five years.
questionKo: (M7.53.1/2)에서 보고한 목표 중 메탄 배출량을 포함하는 목표를 표시하거나, 석유 및 가스 활동에 대한 메탄 관련 배출 감축 목표가 없는 경우, 없는 이유를 설명하고 향후 5년간 메탄 배출량이 어떻게 변화할지 예측해 주세요
simpleHelp: Methane emissions from the fossil fuel sector are increasingly viewed as a financial, regulatory, and reputational issue for companies. Investors are therefore interested in increasing the transparency of methane reduction efforts. This can be achieved by organizations reporting the methane targets they have in place and how they forecast that their methane emissions will change.

options: Methane emissions included in targets reported in questions 7.53.1 or 7.53.2
No methane emissions reduction targets have been set for our fossil fuel activities
optionsKo: Methane 배출량 포함된 목표 보고된 문항 7.53.1 또는 7.53.2
아니요 methane 배출량 reduction 목표 have set 당사의 fossil 연료 활동

columns.text: Primary reason for no methane emissions reduction target
options: Important but not an immediate business priority
Judged to be unimportant, explanation provided
columns.textKo: 주된 이유 아니요 methane 배출량 reduction 목표
optionsKo: 중요 but 아니요t immediate 사업 우선순위

columns.text: Anticipated direction of change in methane emissions
columns.textKo: Anticipated direction 의 change methane 배출량

guidance.textKo: 문항 텍스트 입력 up날짜 입력d remove "석유 및 가스" 및 replace "fossil 연료". New 열 - appears '석유 및 가스' 및 '석탄' 섹터.

guidance.text: This question only appears if you did not select "Target(s) to reduce methane emissions" in response to 7.54.
guidance.textKo: - 이 문항은 선행 문항의 응답에 따라 표시 여부 또는 입력 범위가 달라질 수 있습니다. - 선행 문항의 응답을 수정하면 이 문항 또는 후속 문항의 기존 입력값이 초기화될 수 있으므로 제출 전 함께 확인하십시오.

guidance.text:
General 
A methane-specific target is any target to reduce specifically methane (CH4) emissions e.g. reduction of leakage, venting or flaring of methane. Consider both methane only targets and those which incorporate methane emissions.
If you select "Methane emissions included in targets reported in questions 7.53.1 or 7.53.2", ensure that you have selected "Methane (CH4)" in column "Greenhouse gases covered by target" and explained the methane component of that target in column "Explain target coverage and identify any exclusions" in at least one target reported in 7.53.1 or 7.53.2.
Fossil fuel activities here refer to any oil & gas and coal activities. 
Please explain (column 5) 
If you select "Methane is not applicable" in column "Primary reason for no methane emissions reduction target", explain the reasons why it is not applicable to your organization's fossil fuel activities.
If you select "No methane emissions reduction targets have been set for our fossil fuel activities" in column "Methane emissions reduction targets", provide a company specific description of why no targets have been set and give further details on how you forecast your methane emissions will change over the next five years.
guidance.textKo: - 응답방법과 열 구조에 따라 해당 배출량, 에너지, 목표 또는 성과 지표를 입력하십시오. - 수치는 문항에서 요구하는 단위와 보고연도 기준을 일관되게 적용하십시오. - 산정에 사용한 방법론, 배출계수, 제외 범위 또는 추정 기준이 있다면 설명 입력란에 근거를 남기십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 점 부여됨 per 완료 셀 proportion 숫자 입력 의 셀 displayed. 이 문항에서 최대 2/2점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
'Methane emissions included in targets reported in questions 7.53.1 or 7.53.2' selected in column 'Methane emissions reduction targets' AND 'Methane' selected in column 'Greenhouse gases covered by target' in any row in either 7.53.1 or 7.53.2 - 2/2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No methane emissions reduction targets have been set' selected in column 'Methane emissions reduction targets' AND Any option excluding 'Unknown' selected in column 'Anticipated direction of change in methane emissions' - 1/2 points
A maximum of 1/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No methane emissions reduction targets have been set' selected in column 'Methane emissions reduction targets' AND 'Methane not applicable' selected in column 'Primary reason' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 관리 점수는 인지 점수 요건을 충족한 뒤, 관리 체계, 정량 수치, 적용 범위 또는 실행 조건을 충족하는 경우 부여됩니다. 배점표 기준 M 배점은 0, 1 또는 2/0 또는 2입니다. 비공개 경로, 미응답 셀, 필수 선택지 누락 여부에 따라 점수가 제한될 수 있으므로 위 응답방법과 D/A/M/L 배점표를 함께 확인하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
Points will be awarded per completed cell in proportion to the number of cells displayed.
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this question.

'Methane emissions included in targets reported in questions 7.53.1 or 7.53.2' selected in column 'Methane emissions reduction targets' AND 'Methane' selected in column 'Greenhouse gases covered by target' in any row in either 7.53.1 or 7.53.2 - 2/2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No methane emissions reduction targets have been set' selected in column 'Methane emissions reduction targets' AND Any option excluding 'Unknown' selected in column 'Anticipated direction of change in methane emissions' - 1/2 points
A maximum of 1/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE C)
'No methane emissions reduction targets have been set' selected in column 'Methane emissions reduction targets' AND 'Methane not applicable' selected in column 'Primary reason' - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.

change.q2025_text: Indicate which targets reported in 7.53.1/2 incorporate methane emissions, or if you do not have a methane-specific emissions reduction target for your oil and gas activities, please explain why not and forecast how your methane emissions will change over the next five years.
change.detail_change_types: Change to question text, New column/row, New/modified guidance
change.change_summary:
Question text updated to remove "Oil & Gas" and replace with "fossil fuel".
New column - appears for 'Oil & Gas' and 'Coal' sectors.
change.scoring_change_summary:
CC Coal and Oil and gas Disclosure • Disclosure level is now scored proportionally. Scoring adapted to changes in the question structure.
CC Coal and Oil and gas Management • Scoring of question 7.54.4 has been merged with question 7.54.5 and now focuses on what has been disclosed in column ‘Methane emissions reduction targets'. Scoring adapted to changes in the question structure.
change.reflected:

2026 D/A/M/L point allocation linked
2026 scoring criteria linked
2025-to-2026 change summary linked

simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 기후변화 관련 배출량, 에너지 사용, 목표, 감축활동 및 성과 지표를 확인하는 항목입니다. 응답 시 단위, 산정범위, 배출계수, 보고연도 및 검증 여부를 일관되게 작성하십시오. 문항명: (M7.53.1/2)에서 보고한 목표 중 메탄 배출량을 포함하는 목표를 표시하거나, 석유 및 가스 활동에 대한 메탄 관련 배출 감축 목표가 없는 경우, 없는 이유를 설명하고 향후 5년간 메탄 배출량이 어떻게 변화할지 예측해 주세요
